debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ n, 0 < n ∧ n.primeFactors.card = 2000 ∧ n ∣ 2 ^ n + 1 ↔ Imo2000P5.solution = true

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simp [solution]
  suffices ∀ k, ∃ n > 0, n.primeFactors.card = k ∧ n ∣ 2 ^ n + 1 from this 2000
  intro k; induction' k with k ih
  · exact ⟨1, by simp⟩
  · obtain ⟨n, h0, h1, h2⟩ := ih
    have : ∃ p, p.Prime ∧ p ∣ 2^n + 1 ∧ p ∉ n.primeFactors := sorry
    obtain ⟨p, hp, hpn⟩ := this
    have h_odd : Nat.Odd p := hp.1.odd_of_ne_two (λ h => by
      have : p ∣ 2^n := h.symm ▸ dvd_pow_self 2 (by positivity)
      have : p ∣ 1 := (Nat.dvd_add_iff_right this).mpr hp.2
      norm_num at this)
    refine ⟨n * p, by positivity, by simp [Nat.primeFactors_mul (by positivity) hp.1, hpn, h1], ?_⟩
    have h_n : n ∣ 2 ^ (n * p) + 1 := h2.trans (Nat.dvd_pow_add_pow_of_odd n h_odd)
    have h_p : p ∣ 2 ^ (n * p) + 1 := hp.2.trans (Nat.dvd_pow_add_pow_of_odd n h_odd)
    exact (Nat.coprime_of_prime_not_dvd hp.1 (λ h => hpn (Nat.mem_primeFactors_of_dvd (by positivity) hp.1 h))).mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd h_n h_p
